_readme: Sense-split Stage-A BUILD assumption block ASM-1910..1924 (range 1910-1929 reserved; 1925-1929 unused) — EMITTED by the Fable BUILD agent writer-4 (2026-07-12) for central registration by the coordinator with the commit; registry/assumptions.jsonl is NOT touched by this pass (no git actions).
Range 1910-1929 verified free against registry/assumptions.jsonl at emission time (max registered id 1909; repo-wide grep for ASM-19[12][0-9] empty before this file).

Scope: the Stage-A execution of docs/next/design/sense-split-first-construction.md — kernel-v1 Stage-A corpus build (data/kernel-v1/), per-sense typing, V-A + V-B harnesses (poc/sense-split-stageA/), $0 mock validation, dry-plan. The V-A/V-B RUN is NOT part of this pass: it is HELD pending the maintainer's explicit go (SSA_MAINTAINER_GO=1) and the adjudication §D channel resolution.

The SENSE-SPLIT requirement itself is maintainer-confirmed (ASM-1884); building the materials + harness executes a confirmed requirement and pipelines ahead of the run decision. Nothing here modifies kernel-v0, the frozen g2 lineage, the v2.2 pilot decision, the encoder pin, or any registered verdict.

Tags: MEASURED = read from committed bytes or a stated local diagnostic this tick; LIT-BACKED = published-literature grounding; STIPULATED = a design/authoring choice, never evidence; EXTRAPOLATION = forward claim with resolution path named.

assumptions.claim: R1 mechanical recount at build time against the pinned WN31 extraction: break 59 same-POS (verb) candidate synsets, make 49, find 16, friend 4 — matching ASM-1900 exactly; the fail-closed build gate ERR_R1_RECOUNT enforces these counts on every rebuild.
assumptions.rationale: The sense inventory the clusters draw from is pinned bytes, not training knowledge.

assumptions.claim: Stage-A mint list (an authoring act under the ASM-1902 rules, disclosed per R3): 11 sense concepts over 4 lemmas — break.{shatter, shatter-become, malfunction, violate, interrupt}, make.{create, cause}, find.{locate, discover}, friend.{person, figurative}. Clusters >1 synset: break.interrupt {v-00364717, v-02541382} (the design's illustrative third member v-02752324 'plain broken by mesas' EXCLUDED as stative/spatial — R3(b) truthful-coverage), make.create {v-01624592, v-01657416, v-01658171} (frame projection to Intentionally_create hand-reviewed per R2), make.cause {v-00772482, v-01649617}. friend.figurative is single-source per R5 (no WN synset, no FN frame; wn31Synsets=[], frame=null, disclosed). All other minted senses are single-synset clusters.
assumptions.rationale: Within the 10-12 band of design §5 V-A; every clustering decision listed, nothing silent.

assumptions.claim: Fail-closed corpus gates GREEN at build: G1 duplicateIdentityGroups = 0 (no two senses share an identity; a merge would abort with ERR_SENSE_SHARED_IDENTITY and be reported, never absorbed); G2 pass for all 4 lemmas (each has >=2 minted senses AND a non-empty excludedSenses list; ERR_SENSE_UNDERDETERMINED otherwise); R4 scope closure total: 114 excluded candidate synsets listed with glosses across the 4 sense-index records (break 53, make 44, find 14, friend 3); every excludedSiblingCount on every concept verified against the computed list.
assumptions.rationale: The scope ambiguity that produced the g2 sense channel is closed by construction, not prose (design §1.2 R4).

assumptions.claim: Mint-tool disclosure: mintToolHash at this build is 5fb4fc9f221caeb421583b4eaad349b788af10a768d856ec447111c975e67888, NOT kernel-v0's e07bc2ac… — the tool's corpora.ts gained corpus specs (math/physics/etc) since v0 was minted. The mint ALGORITHM is proven unchanged: re-minting the four frozen kernel-v0 concepts (break/make/find/friend) from their committed bytes with today's tool reproduces their frozen minted-urns.jsonl URNs exactly (fail-closed gate ERR_CONTINUITY_ALGO). The design's 'same pinned mint tool' clause is satisfied in the sense that matters — same identity function — with the hash drift disclosed rather than hidden.
assumptions.rationale: Identity continuity must be demonstrated, not asserted from a stale hash.

assumptions.claim: Carried-explication continuity: make.create, find.locate and friend.person carry their v0 explications BYTE-IDENTICAL and mint to urn:kot: URNs IDENTICAL to urn:kernel-v0:{make,find,friend} (continuity for free, design §2.2 CARRY mechanics applied to SEED/REVIEW rows). break.shatter deliberately does NOT: its agent sort is broadened SomeoneRef->SomethingRef per design §3.2 ('storms live in break.shatter, whose agent slot can be authored as the broader sort'), so its identity differs from v0 break — an intended, manifest-recorded change (fail-closed check expects the inequality).
assumptions.rationale: One deliberate identity change, four demonstrated continuities, zero silent drift.

assumptions.claim: Encoder + frozen-record untouched PROOF: (i) sha256 sweep of the frozen surface (encoder/src/*.ts, data/kernel-v0/**, poc/g2/materials/**, poc/ontology-import-g2/materials/**, poc/ontology-import-g2-v2/** — 99 files) taken BEFORE and AFTER this build is byte-identical; (ii) ALGORITHM_VERSION = 'kot-enc-B/1' (encoder/src/encoder.ts:54) untouched; (iii) encoderContentHash recomputed live at build = 40e8c8ba4c3d081c5051ea62d946d2ee9ee9f3205853b5c377a4c1e647e2d10c = kernel-v0's frozen manifest value, enforced fail-closed (ERR_ENCODER_PIN); (iv) node data/validate.mjs re-run post-build: ALL PASS 54/54 kernel-v0 concepts; (v) no X0 golden touched. Every artifact of this pass is a NEW file under data/kernel-v1/ or poc/sense-split-stageA/.
assumptions.rationale: kernel-v1 is a data corpus off the encoder-version critical path (design §2.1).

assumptions.claim: Per-sense concept typing (CK-UFO sidecar, annotation, binding:false): ALL FIVE break.* senses are ontic_category=event via the deterministic cascade (rule inference from eventive frame, endorsed by review) — the maintainer clause 'a breakage, in any sense, is an event, never a material entity' is enforced STRUCTURALLY by the fail-closed build gate ERR_BREAK_NOT_EVENT; make.*/find.* are events; friend.{person,figurative} are role/relator patterns per design §3.2.
assumptions.rationale: Typing answers to the sense's own meaning; the category hangs off a sense, not a word.

assumptions.claim: Per-sense soft selectional typing: 30 records rebuilt sense-scoped (kot-soft-type/1, binding:false, strength=preference, effect=rank-only, the 5 forbidden effects verbatim from the g2 import; 0 hard operational axioms). The pi:011 defect class is UNMINTABLE by construction: the build aborts (ERR_PI011_CLASS_REMINT) if any break.violate range record anchors at BFO material entity; break.violate's range anchors at generically dependent continuant (promise/law/rule — words). break.shatter's range keeps material entity WHERE IT IS TRUE. The word-scoped g2i records in data/onto-softtype/ stand untouched as the word-scoped layer of record.
assumptions.rationale: The sense-specific preference now attaches to a sense-scoped subject — the g2 fault line closed from the mapping side too (adjudication §B.iii).

assumptions.claim: V-A harness definition: the 5 g2 sense-channel items (g2:pi:011/036/037/070/071) + the friend 040/041 latent pair re-rendered against the SENSE-SPLIT concepts as 30 per-sense soft-type renders (materials/va-items.jsonl), v2.2 rubric byte-reused, the parenthetical now a REAL sense gloss (concept label). Pre-stated resolution criterion (readout expectation, NOT a gate): an item resolves iff every mapped per-sense render gets a decisive pA==pB verdict with a sense-coherent pattern; expectation >=4/5 carried from ASM-1907; pi:011's word-scoped defect additionally has a build-time absence check (the record cannot exist against kernel-v1). Falsifier: persistent disagreement on split items = instrument-or-content defect, a genuine correctness signal.
assumptions.rationale: Decisive in both directions on the adjudication's 5/12 prediction.

assumptions.claim: V-B harness definition: sense-scoped soundness of the BINDING referent sorts — all 31 hard SomeoneRef/SomethingRef/TimeRef/PlaceRef commitments inside the 11 explications (coverage verified fail-closed against the explications at materials build), each rendered as a per-sense ordinary-meaning claim (materials/vb-items.jsonl) on the same yes/no channel. Measure: fraction judged sound (both-decisive both-yes) with Wilson 95% CI. On measurement this becomes the quantity of record for hard-typing soundness, directly replacing 0.3929, which stands re-labelled a word-scoped LOWER BOUND (ASM-1881/1887; design §5 V-B).
assumptions.rationale: The load-bearing unmeasured quantity, made measurable.

assumptions.claim: Dry-plan cost: expected 142 judge calls (2 judges x (10 cal + 30 V-A + 31 V-B)) x pinned conservative $0.012/call bound (carried from ontg2v2, ASM-1874/1906) = $1.704 expected; hard call ceiling 200 => worst-case bound $2.40; live dollar abort at $10 USD cap. Comfortably inside the design's Stage-A <=$10 band. Judges: pA gpt-5.6-sol (codex CLI 0.144.1 pinned) + pB claude-opus-4-8 (maintainer Haiku->Opus directive, issue #25), invocation forms and validity/blinding/checkpoint contracts ported verbatim from the audited run-ontg2v2.py.
assumptions.rationale: Cost stated from the plan actually enforced by the driver's budget gate, not hand-waved.

assumptions.claim: $0 mock validation GREEN (runs/mock-20260712): full pipeline exercised with deterministic pseudo-judges and ZERO LLM calls — preflight 10/10 cal both judges, 30 V-A + 31 V-B items through order/checkpoint/response machinery, assemble computed AC1 (V-A 1.0, V-B 0.9667 with one scripted mock disagreement exercising the disagreement path), 5/5 mock resolution readout, V-B soundness 0.9677 [0.8381, 0.9943] Wilson. Mock labels are pipeline-exercise artifacts ONLY, never evidence. Budget counter recorded 142 calls / $1.704 bound.
assumptions.rationale: The harness demonstrably runs end-to-end before any dollar is risked.

assumptions.claim: HOLD discipline: the real phases refuse to run without SSA_MAINTAINER_GO=1 AND --channel proxy|human (verified: invocation without the env var aborts with the HOLD message and creates no run state). The proxy pair (pA GPT-5.6 + pB Opus-4.8) judges these materials ONLY if the v2.2 pilot passes AC1>=0.65 per the adjudication §D pre-commitment, which this build does not re-litigate and spends nothing before; on pilot FAIL the same materials go to the two-human panel (--channel human documents this; the driver's judge phases are then unused). The v2.2 pilot decision itself is untouched.
assumptions.rationale: Launch-ready is a property of the artifacts; launching is the coordinator's, on the maintainer's go.
assumptions.backing_ref: run-stageA.py require_go(); adjudication §D; design §5 instrument note

assumptions.claim: Expected V-A outcome >=4/5 sense-channel items resolve (carried unchanged from ASM-1907). Resolution path: the held V-A run (~$1.10 of the plan). Either outcome is informative: resolution vindicates the adjudication's 5/12 reclassification; non-resolution on split items is the first genuine non-artifactual correctness signal on the typing content (design §6.2 risk 5 says that is a feature).
assumptions.rationale: Pre-stating the expectation before the run so the readout cannot be shopped.

assumptions.claim: Scope closure of this pass: Stage A BUILD only. No V-A/V-B judgments were spent ($0 total model spend; the only executions were the deterministic corpus build, the materials build, the $0 mock, and the dry-plan). Stages B-D remain gated on Stage A's readout (ASM-1909). No feasibility conclusion on CORRECTNESS or EFFICIENCY is stated or implied. kernel-v0 remains frozen and authoritative for all frozen lineages; kernel-v1 Stage-A supersedes the four v0 word concepts for NEW consumers only, with the total deprecation map deferred to Stage C as designed.
assumptions.rationale: The build is the confirmed-requirement execution; the measurement is the maintainer's call.
